title: Canned
description: Canned adds new blocks used to store your foods! Add up to 8 cans in the same block (like Candles).
body:
[![requires_framework](https://api.lpsmods.dev/data/framework.png)](https://mrcrayfish.com/mods/framework)

Canned adds new blocks used to store your foods! Add up to 8 cans in the same block (like Candles). Perfect for decorating your warehouse or bulk food storage.

## Loaders
- [Bedrock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/canned)
- **Fabric**
- **Forge**
- **NeoForge**

## Open can

1. Place Can Opener in your mainhand.
2. Place the can that you want to open in your offhand.
3. Right click to use the Can Opener to open the can
4. In return you should get 8 food items, an empty can.

Note that doing this deals 1 damage to your Can Opener.

# Supported Mods
The following are **planned** to be supported:

- [Lot's More Food](https://modrinth.com/mod/lots-more-food)
- [More Honey](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-honey)
- [More Gold](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-gold)

## FAQ
### Can I add this to my mod pack?
Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?
I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.

## Maven
```gradle
dependencies {
    modImplementation "maven.modrinth:canned:fabric-${project.canned_version}"
}
```
[More Information](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/tutorials/maven/)
